# SabahWebs

SabahWebs is a small web design and SEO studio based in Kota Kinabalu, Sabah, Malaysia. We hand-code fast, lightweight websites and do practical local SEO for small businesses across Sabah and beyond. Pricing is flat and simple: a single-page website starts from RM500, and a small-business site of up to 3 pages starts from RM1000. You can reach us at hello@sabahwebs.com or on WhatsApp at +60 16-843 0891.

## Services

- [Web design in Kota Kinabalu](https://sabahwebs.com/web-design-kota-kinabalu.html): Fast, affordable, hand-built websites for businesses in Kota Kinabalu and across Sabah, with SEO built in from the start.
- [SEO services in Sabah](https://sabahwebs.com/seo-services-sabah.html): Practical local SEO to help Sabah businesses get found on Google and AI search, without jargon or long lock-in contracts.

## Blog

- [AI SEO Malaysia: Get Found on ChatGPT and Google AI](https://sabahwebs.com/blog/ai-seo-malaysia.html): How Malaysian businesses can get found on ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI.
- [How Much Does SEO Cost in Malaysia?](https://sabahwebs.com/blog/how-much-does-seo-cost-in-malaysia.html): What SEO really costs in Malaysia, what a legitimate package includes, and red flags to watch for.
- [How Long Does SEO Take to Work? (The Honest Answer)](https://sabahwebs.com/blog/how-long-does-seo-take-to-work-the-honest-answer.html): A realistic timeline for indexing, rankings, and meaningful results.
- [Local SEO Basics for Sabah Businesses](https://sabahwebs.com/blog/local-seo-basics-for-sabah-businesses.html): The handful of things that actually move the needle for a local business on Google.
- [Why Your Sabah Business Needs a Website in 2026](https://sabahwebs.com/blog/why-your-sabah-business-needs-a-website-in-2026.html): Better Google visibility, more trust, and an always-open storefront.
- [Why Your Small Business Doesn't Need a Big Website](https://sabahwebs.com/blog/why-your-small-business-doesnt-need-a-big-website.html): Why one good page that loads fast often beats ten nobody reads.
- [Fast Sites Win: A Quick Word on Page Speed](https://sabahwebs.com/blog/fast-sites-win-page-speed.html): Why we hand-build lightweight pages instead of stacking plugins.

## Key facts

- Business name: SabahWebs
- Location: Kota Kinabalu, Sabah, Malaysia
- Services: web design, web development, and local SEO for small businesses
- Pricing: single-page website from RM500; small-business site (up to 3 pages) from RM1000; flat, one-time pricing
- Contact: hello@sabahwebs.com, WhatsApp +60 16-843 0891
- Clients: Audio Pro Malaysia, Best Sabah, Borneo Outback Tours, Nexus Australia, ProSteel Sdn Bhd, Permai Polyclinics Fortuna
